description: Pane-health classifier calibration corpus (bd-3v1gs.2). Each entry pins a labeled scrollback fixture against the expected detector verdict so future tuning surfaces regressions as failed classifications. Seed corpus targets the bd-a2fwr / bd-9b0et / bd-2mb03.6.6 / bd-v9sbz cases; new fixtures append here.

fixtures.notes: Go panic with no trailing prompt. Must trip the 50-line crash escalation.
bd-a2fwr/bd-9b0et: panic in scrollback, prompt below it. Crash issue must NOT fire.
bd-2mb03.6.6 / bd-9b0et: stale panic far above, prompt visible, agent producing new output past the trailing window. Full-buffer prompt scan must still suppress crash.
